chief_complaint: A 40-year-old male patient presented with progressively worsening respiratory symptoms.
history: The patient had a known history of COPD and foreign body (FB) aspiration in adults is uncommon and often overlooked, particularly without a clear history of aspiration. Bilateral airway obstruction due to aspirated dentures is exceptionally rare and may mimic chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), resulting in diagnostic delay.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings are not specified.
labs: Imaging revealed radio-opaque FBs in the bilateral mainstem bronchi.
correct_diagnosis: Bilateral mainstem bronchial obstruction by aspirated dentures
differentials: Bilateral mainstem bronchial obstruction by aspirated dentures
correct_ranking: Bilateral mainstem bronchial obstruction by aspirated dentures
